attributes.description: Connection states, request processing, and capacity for Nginx.

params.markdown:
## Server Internals

Deep-dive into NGINX connection handling and request processing internals.

- **Connection states**: Active, reading, writing, waiting breakdown
- **New connections**: Accept and handled rates over time
- **Request processing**: Cumulative request counter and request rate
- **Connection drops**: Dropped connections trend (accepted − handled)
- **Processed connections**: Cumulative handled connections

attributes.title: [Nginx OTel] Server Internals
